# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Pull Request Build

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, edited, reopened, synchronize]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    env:
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      PR_HEAD_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
      PR_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Capture PR metadata
        id: pr
        run: |
          {
            echo "title<<EOF"
            echo "${PR_TITLE}"
            echo "EOF"
            echo "body<<EOF"
            echo "${PR_BODY}"
            echo "EOF"
            echo "number=${PR_NUMBER}"
            echo "url=${PR_URL}"
            echo "head_ref=${PR_HEAD_REF}"
            echo "sha=${PR_SHA}"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Building PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}"
          echo "Description:"
          echo "${PR_BODY}"

      - name: Generate deployment commit message
        id: commit_msg
        run: |
          SAFE_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "${PR_TITLE}" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g' | cut -c1-120)"
          echo "message=deploy: ${SAFE_TITLE} (#${PR_NUMBER})" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Notify build system
        run: |
          echo "Notification Title: ${PR_TITLE}"
          echo "Notification Body: ${PR_BODY}"
          echo "Commit Message: ${{ steps.commit_msg.outputs.message }}"
          echo "PR URL: ${PR_URL}"

      - name: Upload build summary
        run: |
          {
            echo "### Pull Request Build"
            echo ""
            echo "**Title:** ${PR_TITLE}"
            echo ""
            echo "**Description:**"
            echo ""
            echo "${PR_BODY}"
            echo ""
            echo "**PR:** ${PR_URL}"
            echo ""
            echo "**Commit Message Template:** `${{ steps.commit_msg.outputs.message }}`"
          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
